today.subtitle: Walk/jog cancelled by Kevin (work overload); converted to rest. Recovery signals were green — this is a schedule conflict, not a readiness call.
today.adjustment_label: Cancelled by Kevin — work overload; converted to rest day
today.why: Kevin requested cancellation due to work load on 2026-06-08. Per adjustment-rules.md rebalancing: a dropped walk needs no make-up (recovery beats volume); cardio is still covered by Sat Baldwin + Fri pickleball, and the two lift days (Tue/Thu) are protected.

cut_note: *7d TDEE avg (2,344 cal/d) suppressed by today's partial read. 6-day complete avg ~2,613 cal/d → truer ceiling ~1.4 lb/wk.
